theme: E4 cycle 2 — build the /network narrative surface (design-spec bands 1-3): a sparse SS-Ghibli image-led hero ('The network of aDNA computers'), a 'network of real relationships' diagram-as-proof (the honest hub-and-spoke NetworkDiagram), a 'What is an aDNA computer?' band making the local-by-default / opt-in-federation boundary explicit (Standing Rule 4), and a 'topology at a glance' band (typed 5-edge taxonomy + live counts -> /vaults/graph). Add the Network header-nav link. Run-a-node onboarding (152) + govern-trust anchor (153) deferred by design.
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; SS-Ghibli painterly hero (ADR-032); honest-topology discipline (the diagram is the dropped-ring hub-and-spoke; every count cited from real data); ethos shown-not-preached (a commons you join, the local/shared boundary as the operator's choice).
operator_scope: Cycle 151 = build /network bands 1-3. Two operator decisions this session: (1) generate a NEW SS-Ghibli painterly hero (not just text+diagram); (2) add the Network header-nav link now (pulls RLP Gap #4 nav work forward from 153).

iii_7step.measure: /network did not exist; the network had a truthful data layer (cycle 150: 22 cited edges, data-driven /vaults/graph) and an honest homepage demo, but no narrative surface explaining what a node IS or where the local/shared boundary sits. Network-Legibility rubric items 1 (node clarity) + 3 (local/shared boundary) unaddressed; item 5 (join scent) only partial.
iii_7step.orient: The page is mostly assembly, not new machinery: reuse HomeHero (image-led title hero), the honest NetworkDiagram (no props), the homepage .section-inner scaffold, the /vaults/graph .le typed-legend technique, buildWebPageJsonLD, and the proven e1_*_gen.py Imagen pattern. The only genuinely new asset is the hero image; the only genuinely new copy is the 'aDNA computer' mental model + the local/shared split.
iii_7step.select: Build a standalone BaseLayout page (not a content-collection entry) with 4 bands (hero + 3 sections). Generate a peopleless Tokyo-Night hero distinct from the homepage isometric (operator picked N2_v2 'settlements map'). Add Network to the header nav. Defer run-a-node + govern-trust to 152/153.
iii_7step.implement: site/src/pages/network.astro (4 bands); e4_network_hero_gen.py (sibling runner reusing GHIBLI_TAIL/load_api_key; 2 motifs x 2 variants, Ultra, 0 retries, $0.16); hero_network.png (winner N2_v2); Header.astro Network nav link (leading); /network appended to gate-4/6/9 route arrays.
iii_7step.re_measure: build PASS 162 pages (was 161, +/network); idempotent prebuild data regen (no edge change this cycle). Lighthouse /network Perf 100 / A11y 100 / BP 100 / SEO 100 (LCP 0.5s, CLS 0, TBT 0ms).
